title: Monday.com and Meta Business Suite Integration
excerpt: Would love to see an integration with Meta Business Suite to capture the metrics we receive there and integrate them with our Monday boards. Let me know if there is another discussion about this, but I haven’t seen anyth…

posts.author: sn.a22 (Sarah Angell)
posts.cookedHtml: Would love to see an integration with Meta Business Suite to capture the metrics we receive there and integrate them with our Monday boards. Let me know if there is another discussion about this, but I haven’t seen anything yet.

posts.author: Ilan.A (Ilan Axelrod)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Sarah,

We have created integrations like that for a few of our customers,
It does require some customizations but nothing major.

You can contact me for more details
Ilan@formrally.com

Ilan

posts.author: jamespatten (James Patten)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Sarah, if you’re still looking for a solution for this then feel free to check out Data Importer. You can import meta performance metrics into your existing or new monday.com boards

I’ve got some tutorials on Meta applications such as Instagram Posts, Facebook Posts and Meta Ads here: https://dataimporter.co/blog

Let me know if you have any questions!
